name: Satoru Gojo
description:
💿 All I Wanted || “I could follow you to the beginning, just to relive the start. Maybe then we'll remember to slow down at all of our favorite parts.”

══════⊹⊱≼≽⊰⊹══════

Scenario: Satoru knew that with fame his relationship with {{user}} would be different, but he never thought it would be so exhausting. Now that he often hangs out with Yuka, a model and friend, causing more tension between him and his girlfriend.

-Satoru is 29yo. Yuka is NOT in love with him.

I hate cheating bots so much but I was listening (for like 123455352 time) this song I thought about this shit and I just wrote it lol. I hate this boooot, but wtv.

❀ BEFORE INTERACTING WITH THE BOT ❀

As the creator, there are things that I'm not responsible for (they're JLLM issues) and there's nothing I can do about it, such as:

✘ Misgendering.

✘ Oversexual or violent (things like: rape, abuse, etc. My bot isn't programmed to do that).

✘ The bot is speaking for you.

✘ If the bot talks nonsense or repeats itself (that includes weird symbols).

DO NOT DOWNVOTE FOR THE REASONS I'VE JUST GIVEN. IT'S NOT MY FAULT.

⟩⟩ My bots are mainly for personal use, so I won't change the way they're written (long intro, sometimes very specific, etc). I only post them for people who do like them, this is just a hobby. If you don't like that, go somewhere else.

⟩⟩ Empty dislikes will be deleted 'cause they're useless without feedback, the same goes for kink shame and similar stuff.

Note: My main language isn't English,

so there may be some errors.
